tweets.text: As we wrap up #AANHPI Heritage Month, @UnderSecStateJ Zeya shares her thoughts on three decades of public service and her role as the first AANHPI woman Under Secretary. AANHPI people are making a difference at the Department. More on joining us at: https://t.co/CqRHMQaeoc https://t.co/Xx7UlWtcSY

Our new @StateCDP Bureau of Cyberspace and Digital Policy is hosting a virtual career booth until June 2. Learn how you can be on the forefront of shaping the future of cyberspace and digital security policy. https://t.co/x2btmBVek7

At the EU-U.S. Trade and Technology Council Ministerial, @SecBlinken spoke about seizing the opportunities and addressing the challenges posed by emerging technology.  Learn more: https://t.co/b9CpgAOs1l. https://t.co/rwmisA4q9T

Live now! @SecBlinken participates in a joint press availability with EU-U.S. Trade and Technology Council Co-Chairs in Luleå, Sweden. Also streaming on YouTube at: https://t.co/69xRfQo83d. https://t.co/QBA80IN1Vw
Live now! @SecBlinken participates in a EU-U.S. Trade and Technology Council Stakeholder Roundtable in Luleå, Sweden. Also streaming on YouTube at: https://t.co/mbDDmbyWJL. https://t.co/0DY2ZO7Ipx
Exciting update on our space diplomacy: There are now 25 Artemis Accords signatories. Congratulations and welcome to Spain @CienciaGob. Ad Astra!

.@POTUS: @NATO has proved the indispensable Alliance—committed to Europe whole, free, and at peace. Today, we see all too clearly how NATO remains an indispensable Alliance for the world of today and the world of tomorrow. https://t.co/X4NkmTXY7Z

The shared history between the U.S. and Sweden goes back 240 years. We are both committed to promoting democracy, security, human rights, gender equity and equality, international development, sustainability, and combating the climate crisis. https://t.co/sPlf4q9xew https://t.co/JYyM0b6rZz

This week Sweden is hosting the 4th U.S.-EU Trade and Technology Council meeting – transatlantic cooperation to address climate change, shore up our supply chains, and support a green transition is key to our shared national security interests. https://t.co/sPlf4q8ZoY https://t.co/ESGgfa3u4B

We released the State Department’s first-ever Strategic Framework for Space Diplomacy this morning. Through international space cooperation, we are advancing our national space objectives and bringing the benefits of space back down to Earth. https://t.co/Yf16cIO8aK
Live now! @SecBlinken holds a joint press availability with Swedish Prime Minister Ulf Kristersson in Luleå, Sweden. Also streaming at:  https://t.co/UF7HALVFuy. https://t.co/Hd3sanLP4S

International students share their talents and cultures with their new communities – and bring what they learn abroad back home. @SecBlinken thanks @nafsa for 75 years of building networks of global cooperation and helping to make international education, and diplomacy, possible. https://t.co/daaJCrGcCH

Each Memorial Day, we honor those who lost their lives in military service to the United States. Arlington National Cemetery is the final resting place for military personnel of every major U.S. conflict since the Revolutionary War. Learn the history here: https://t.co/zPimqQIfr4

On the 75th anniversary of @UNPeacekeeping Day, the United States salutes the bravery, service, and sacrifice of the more than one million people from 125 countries who have served – or are now serving – in UN peacekeeping missions around the world. https://t.co/DL4LeDVKxD
On Memorial Day, we remember the fallen who gave their lives for our nation. We honor their bravery and sacrifice. https://t.co/TlYp703ZgE

In “The Week at State,” the @G7 Summit wraps up in Hiroshima, Japan, @SecBlinken travels to Papua New Guinea and takes part in the @forumsec, and @UnderSecStateP Nuland speaks at the Kyiv Security Forum. For the latest, head over to https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/eibluxXt2R

.@PEPFAR continues to save lives throughout the world, including in sub-Saharan Africa. Community health worker Mandisa Dukashe, who is living with HIV, explains the importance of antiretroviral therapy for women in South Africa. #PEPFAR20YearsofImpact https://t.co/b4WyfWBR72

.@PEPFAR was signed into law by President George W. Bush 20 years ago today. Since then, the program has saved 25 million lives and transformed the global HIV/AIDS response. Learn more about this vital program and its impact: https://t.co/AiSMjofOUu
This Memorial Day, we honor and remember those who sacrificed their lives for our country. Read about the 2023 National Memorial Day Observance to honor America’s fallen: https://t.co/ER8QgOlLA3

As we wrap #AANHPIHM, @StateDeputySpox shares the importance of having a workforce that looks like America: “Around the world we have Asian Americans, Native Hawaiians, and Pacific Islanders leading on the forefront of the important work being done here at the State Department." https://t.co/vz8tcGpXWh

Representation matters. During #AANHPIHeritageMonth, we recognize the great contributions of Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders to the United States. @USMissionBelize Ambassador Michelle Kwan explains the importance of role models for our shared future. https://t.co/jO7mZ1vLtl

.@GlobalTiesUS is the largest and oldest citizen diplomacy network in the United States. Read about their efforts to build and strengthen crucial ties between Americans and people around the world to address global challenges through @StateIVLP exchanges. https://t.co/gwDZqZJ55Z

Victims of Russia’s war of aggression against Ukraine deserve justice, and the world is working to make it happen. Read more about international efforts to investigate the atrocities committed in Ukraine since Putin’s forces invaded. https://t.co/lCOIWw8gKe

The @g7 Clean Energy Economy Action Plan outlines commitments and next steps toward addressing the climate crisis and investing in clean energy. “We will move forward united in order to achieve the goals of the Paris Agreement.” https://t.co/vXnbBy0JQQ https://t.co/6mQLxXUHLW

Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/est8totDyA.
 https://t.co/WBnb3iwbs9

When a parent learns their child has been taken or kept abroad without their consent and against their custody rights, it’s not just a “family matter.” More on the role the Department plays in helping to address international parental child abductions: https://t.co/oImF0a8ZcQ https://t.co/KQFCv8978c
We continue to recognize the richness and diversity of African cultures and all those who advance the goal of a more prosperous African continent. #AfricaDay https://t.co/hK8ZrUJFyg

The U.S. recognizes that Sub-Saharan Africa plays a critical role in advancing global priorities to the benefit of Africans and Americans. That is why we are building on our actions and commitments to deepen our engagement and partnerships in Africa. https://t.co/8fg0lGzPyf
On #AfricaDay and every day, we thank those who work tirelessly to help achieve our shared vision of a democratic, peaceful, secure, and prosperous Africa. https://t.co/FSsgKzsEgt

Sign up for the Smart Traveler Enrollment Program (STEP) to get up-to-date safety and security information in the event of an emergency abroad. #TravelSmartFromTheStart https://t.co/4m3cQyoVMo https://t.co/KwiF2hbH13
.@POTUS: We’re not looking to decouple from China, we’re looking to de-risk and diversify our relationship with China. Read more on our approach: https://t.co/N2t7QcWmEp

.@POTUS: The @g7 reaffirmed our shared and unwavering commitment to stand with the brave people of Ukraine as they defend themselves against Russia’s brutal war of aggression and the war crimes being committed. https://t.co/N2t7QcWUtX https://t.co/ehSphFD15e

.@StateDeptSpox discusses new policy to restrict the issuance of visas for Bangladeshi individuals believed to be responsible for, or complicit in, undermining Bangladesh’s democratic election process: “Our message today to the people of Bangladesh is that we stand behind you.” https://t.co/FdvtCp2rzP
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/oUW2U9NX0Y. https://t.co/s3Bpf5YezG

The Kremlin spreads disinformation to try to deceive people about its own responsibility for the global food crisis & to undermine the Black Sea Grain Initiative, which has been critical in alleviating the consequences of Putin’s war against Ukraine. More: https://t.co/qfpVJbwSld

Ukrainian soldier—and musician—Moisei shares how he is inspiring the people of Ukraine, and the importance of resilience as his country defends itself from Russia’s relentless attacks. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/1VoPTOyOfC

.@POTUS: “The United States continues to do all we can to strengthen Ukraine’s ability to defend itself.” More from his meeting with Ukraine President Zelenskyy.: https://t.co/QvLXnQBD2C https://t.co/P9FUNINwHX

The United States plans to contribute another $250 million to the Pandemic Fund at the World Bank to make sure the world is better prepared to prevent, detect, and respond to future pandemics. https://t.co/k2SUGbCM7P

.@SecBlinken on the Pacific nations: Our partnership is crucial to how we deliver for our people, how we meet their needs and aspirations, and advance our common vision for the region–one that is free and open, connected, prosperous, secure, and resilient. https://t.co/PIVGohV6p2 https://t.co/MBW6C0CFSm

.@POTUS: The security and prosperity of the American people are substantially increased by working in concert with our closest allies and partners to build a future of greater economic strength and resilience—and a world that is more peaceful and stable. https://t.co/y0eBLnp6kw

The safety and security of U.S. citizens is our top priority. Recently, we teamed up with the @DeptofDefense @USMC's @26MEU for a joint training exercise on evacuating U.S. citizens from a crisis overseas. Read more in the latest DipNote blog entry. https://t.co/StpFHw3vej
Live now! @statedeptspox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/qV6RgFCZCP. https://t.co/MDic1ULzqH

.@StatePRM and @usaidsaveslives are providing $245 million in humanitarian assistance to Sudan and neighboring countries. The United States is looking to identify additional ways to support vulnerable populations affected by the conflict in Sudan. https://t.co/K61MTRBIv8

.@SecBlinken on signing a Memorandum of Cooperation on Education with Japan: The collaborative efforts that we’re launching are about improving the lives of our people. That’s fundamentally what it comes down to, now, but also for generations to come.  https://t.co/vTysCGFEDg https://t.co/9huKEF3BId

.@SecBlinken’s visit to Papua New Guinea for the U.S.-Pacific Islands Forum Leaders Dialogue is a testament to renewed U.S. commitment to our Pacific Island neighbors. More on our partnerships in the region and how we are delivering for our people: https://t.co/nIpp9S2isv
Watch now! @SecBlinken and Papua New Guinea Prime Minister James Marape host a press availability earlier today. https://t.co/VJ8ATzI75J

Through @USAID, the United States will provide an additional $12.5 million to help Papua New Guinea strengthen the critical resources and systems needed to make communities more climate resilient. https://t.co/9yzak1D7Iw https://t.co/0FE9UdvMsf
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming at https://t.co/IJaPRbxQRA. https://t.co/UBpz9WTS64

The United States will continue to partner with Papua New Guinea on strengthening economic relations, security cooperation, and people-to-people ties, as well as promoting inclusive and sustainable development. Learn more: https://t.co/9yzak1D7Iw https://t.co/ZzGZYsdUFW
Everyday actions can help conserve 30 percent of our lands and waters by 2030. What is your #BiodiversityDay activity?https://t.co/mjYrU2EXEg https://t.co/Ks6tCGVWJG

In “The Week at State,” we released the International Religious Freedom report and @SecBlinken joined @POTUS on his travel to Hiroshima, Japan for the G7 Leaders Summit. For the latest, visit https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/Bpiq1X4maG

The United States opened an embassy in Tonga on May 9, a symbol of the U.S. commitment to our bilateral relations, the people of Tonga, and to our partnerships in the Indo-Pacific region. Learn more about U.S.-Tonga ties:  https://t.co/Nn6UXL6SOn

We must BEE focused on protecting our pollinators if we want to maintain healthy ecosystems and safeguard the future of our food supply, our planet, and our people. What will you do today to support bees? #WorldBeeDay https://t.co/OG5yQaStyA

On May 21, renowned musicians will pay tribute to Russian Nobel Peace Prize laureate, scientist, and human rights activist Andrei Sakharov. His ideas on peace and humanity resonate more than 30 years after his death. Read about his dedication to freedom: https://t.co/ffJtVPHZ8J

Before you travel, make sure you check https://t.co/yR0YJrGtYg to access country-specific alerts and advisories that could affect your plans. Learn more: https://t.co/ffqBux5NPo #TravelSmartFromTheStart https://t.co/UGvdsO2vB2

Step up your travel game! Sign up for the free Smart Traveller Enrollment Program (STEP) to receive safety and security updates from the nearest U.S. embassy before and during your travel. Enroll at https://t.co/LUiIr82ilp. #TravelSmartFromtheStart https://t.co/ju3B0JHrkA

The U.S.-Japan alliance is fundamental to regional stability and prosperity. Learn more about diplomatic history and cooperation between the United States and Japan since the Treaty of Peace signing at the end of World War Two: https://t.co/uCst6oMMvl

Join people around the world on Endangered Species Day by learning about how to protect threatened and endangered species, like Hawksbill Turtles, Black Rhinos, and Hooded Vultures. #EndWildlifeTrafficking https://t.co/1SCyAB6izi https://t.co/cFWGMsvtjE

.@SecBlinken at the release of the International Religious Freedom Report: When each person is respected for their beliefs, they are more empowered to reach their full potential, which in turn lifts entire communities and societies. https://t.co/Sq3FYWeoB3 https://t.co/Inw7C4efwx

While in Moldova, @DepSecStateMR Verma signed a new air transport agreement on behalf of the United States. The new agreement expands the trade and travel opportunities between our countries. Learn more: https://t.co/VO6tVlfRvZ

.@StateDeputySpox: We join the people of Iran and the international community in calling on Iran to not carry out these executions. The execution of these men, after what has been widely regarded as sham trials, would be an affront to human rights and basic dignity. https://t.co/DpTVcxh8iK
Live now! @statedeputyspox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/ZpoxvrzRY3. https://t.co/bFxwQJiRVy

.@SecBlinken: During this decisive decade, our efforts and investments – together with our partners – will determine whether we succeed in advancing our shared affirmative vision for the international system. https://t.co/dmgEl93W80 https://t.co/D85rFoczDO

LGBTQI+ rights are human rights. Today on #IDAHOBIT, we pledge to continue the fight to end discrimination against lesbian, gay, bisexual, intersex, transgender, and gender diverse persons. https://t.co/dNB4I19nzx

We welcome news from the @UN and Türkiye on the extension of the Black Sea Grain Initiative. We urge Russia to fully comply with and expand the deal so that food remains accessible and affordable for people across the globe. https://t.co/wit7oujtXp
Live now! @StateDeputySpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming at https://t.co/QvBIwv4vl9. https://t.co/qdXUwMhOI1

State Department Special Envoy to Advance the Human Rights of LGBTQI+ People: We all know someone who is LGBTQI+, so it’s every single person’s obligation to find ways to make the LGBTQI+ people in their lives feel safe, respected, and seen before the law. https://t.co/ozTzuiRjlL
The United States continues to work with governments around the globe and civil society advocates to advance the human rights of LGBTQI+ persons. #IDAHOBIT https://t.co/1Vx2K8husd

We welcome Spain to the #BlueDotNetwork Steering Committee. Everyone benefits when our infrastructure, electrical grids, and communications networks are developed to recognized standards. More on our work to create sustainable & inclusive infrastructure: https://t.co/maQTlLa0iN https://t.co/IbSYqyFW73

.@SecBlinken on Capitol Hill: The world is watching how we — and Beijing — manage this relationship, and it’s in our best strategic interest to do so responsibly in a way that promotes security and prosperity and deliver solutions on shared challenges that matter. https://t.co/b3LcyJDGoW

Live now! @‌SecBlinken, @SecDef, and @‌SecRaimondo testify before the U.S. Senate Committee on Appropriations on “Investing in U.S. Security, Competitiveness, and the Path Ahead for the U.S.-China Relationship.” Also streaming at: https://t.co/4PY1OlR25c . https://t.co/l82toYzyaU
Live now! @StateDeputySpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming at https://t.co/QvBIwv4vl9. https://t.co/iMAPtEm5pm

Last year, @POTUS signed the CHIPS and Science Act to protect U.S. national security and advance scientific discovery. Read how @StateISN is supporting secure global semiconductor supply chains and trusted networks and why that matters to you.  https://t.co/osCTwE3kul

Today @SecBlinken released the annual International Religious Freedom Report, highlighting the status of religious freedom, a core American value and a fundamental freedom enshrined in international law. https://t.co/da8mrM0xcs

.@StateDeputySpox congratulates Amy Pope on her election as the next @UNMigration Director General; she is the right choice to lead IOM at a time when more than 100 million people are displaced globally as a result of conflict, climate-related disruptions, and extreme poverty. https://t.co/Hscic7xfz9
Live now! @StateDeputySpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming at https://t.co/s2lpFfdMCi. https://t.co/JctX7Amb4h

The United States continues to enforce existing immigration laws and is working to counter disinformation spread by traffickers and other bad actors, so that people who want to migrate have accurate information about how to do so legally and safely. https://t.co/rC8OjWMoXX

In “The Week at State,” @SecBlinken travels to Atlanta, delivers remarks at the @FreedomHouse awards, and honors this year’s @WorldFoodPrize laureate Heidi Kühn; @DeputySecState speaks at the Indian Ocean Conference. For the latest, visit https://t.co/58Uc9lIOt7. https://t.co/Rj79ci7YDN

The Black Sea Grain Initiative has delivered nearly 30 million metric tons of Ukrainian agricultural exports worldwide. It helps calm markets, safeguard against price spikes, and feed people in need, including in Yemen, Ethiopia, Somalia, and Afghanistan. https://t.co/0PTsqwaKXV

.@SecBlinken: We are operating in an extraordinarily diverse world. If we were to leave our own diversity on the sidelines, we’d be shortchanging ourselves, shortchanging our foreign policy, shortchanging the country. We’re determined not to do that. https://t.co/VtSDuqJ7SF https://t.co/vqif8Kyl4u
There is an urgent need to extend and expand the Black Sea Grain Initiative to ensure ships are able to access Ukraine’s ports so more food can get to global markets. https://t.co/vAoDS5nn5z

This week in Warsaw, we reaffirmed our commitment to justice for Ukraine by gathering with UK and EU partners in solidarity to support Ukraine’s Prosecutor General. We remain firmly #UnitedWithUkraine.

The U.S. is addressing irregular migration throughout the region at the source. Together, we are making all of our countries safer and more secure by providing the foundation for a better and more hopeful future for all. https://t.co/IIPpRkCHWi

As we conclude Public Service Recognition Week, one of our Foreign Service colleagues describes her journey to public service and how the opportunity to improve the world motivates her to serve the American people. Read Kendra's story: https://t.co/jDbMPTQ0Oy

The United States is providing humanitarian assistance to countries throughout the Americas to help assist refugees, asylum seekers, and vulnerable migrants– protecting vulnerable populations throughout the region. https://t.co/kVA2YgnSQE

Spain’s assistance for Ukraine has come in all forms: robust military aid, humanitarian aid, and of course, the generosity of the Spanish people, who have now welcomed more than 173,000 displaced Ukrainians into their communities. https://t.co/sjDrFawA3Y https://t.co/FvLuW4IGit

The Global Equality Fund is a public-private partnership to advance human rights of LGBTQI+ persons. Spain is the 18th country to join the effort, which has dedicated $100 million+ to civil society and human rights defenders in over 100 countries. https://t.co/hAhBRmmUP8

The United States continues to enforce existing immigration laws and is working to counter disinformation spread by traffickers and other bad actors, so that people who want to migrate have accurate information about how to do so legally and safely.

The United States is the largest single provider of humanitarian assistance worldwide to people in need, including refugees, asylum seekers, internally displaced persons, stateless persons, and vulnerable migrants. https://t.co/qYMtSv3dY4

.@SecBlinken on Regional Processing Centers: These innovative centers will allow people to stay in their own countries and determine eligibility for lawful pathways to the U.S., making them less likely to undertake the dangerous and costly journey to the border to seek asylum. https://t.co/qOmWXPG2Va

@RootsofPeace, which works to transform heavily mined areas into sustainable agricultural farmland. #FoodPrize23 https://t.co/8Ova5xpsrh

The United States is thrilled to welcome Norway’s assumption of the @‌ArcticCouncil Chairship. Norway is an exemplary Ally and leader across Arctic affairs; we fully support its leadership. https://t.co/6M8bE6H7XC

Today we are pleased to announce the opening of our newest embassy, in Nuku’alofa, Tonga. We value our shared history with Tonga, a relationship that dates back to 1886. The new embassy is a symbol of our commitment to a shared future and to the people of Tonga. #USWithTonga https://t.co/WklK1pFdev
